rawDependencyOutputs.fetch-open-prs:
The repository is on GitHub, not Azure DevOps. There is no Azure DevOps organization configured and no Azure DevOps remote. I cannot query Azure DevOps pull requests without:

1. An Azure DevOps organization URL
2. A project name
3. Authentication credentials (PAT)

Please provide:
- Your Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrganization/`)
- The project name
- Ensure you're logged in via `az devops login`
